feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /news/ News: AIPAC Is Losing Its Sway Over Democrats
entry.content: The pro-Israel group’s absolutist stance has alienated even moderate Democrats who support the Jewish state. https://www.yahoo.com/news/politics /articles/aipac-losing-sway-over-de mocrats-111559774.html WASHINGTON — In 2024, a super PAC allied with the American Israel Public Affairs Committee spent $4 million to boost then-state Sen. Sarah Elfreth in a contested Democratic primary in Maryland. It’s not an exaggeration to say the money was decisive: It was more than twice as much as Elfreth’s ca
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /int/ International: My old folks are getting old imc
entry.content: I've had a lot of failings in life. I'm a khhv with few friends, low chance of making it, but I don't care about that. I don't even want a relationship anymore. What keeps me up at night is that I see my old folks getting older and I worry about them. We've never had much and live paycheck to paycheck, and unlike the stories of rich boomers hoarding all the wealth, they will probably get old with no safety net at all. I am not sure how am I even going to be in a position to help them in my count
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /b/ Random: Never trust any moocher over 25 who lives with his parents still
entry.content: They are parasites who lack morals obviously. My parents never wiped my ass until I was 18, they were shit boomers so I jumped ahead a grade and moved out when I was 17 since I wanted to drink and white guys weren't all a bunch of snitches and pussies back then like they all are today. I do the hiring where I am and I treat the applications of losers who still mooch off their folks same as I would a niggers application, in the garbage it goes not even considered, Try McDonald's bitch. So sick of
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /b/ Random: Love and appreciation
entry.content: So I had an idea With the recent thinking of gaming companies and the decisions government agencies do everyday… Why don’t we show them how much we love their ideas, showing them love and appreciation through some gifts delivered to their offices? I was thinking… A nice set of LOTS of opened cans of Surströmming with little notes telling them about which decisions we are thankful for all over their buildings and the exteriors They must be SO hungry after all that decision making, so I’m sure the
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: what actually is a cve
entry.content: "CopyFail" root access bug (CVE-2026-31431) had a severity score of 7.8 and they made a big deal out of it. So I downloaded all the CVEs, dropped all except 2025-2026, put them in severity score version bins, dropped ones below median from both, and put them in weekly stacks. Median ended up being near 7.0 in both so these are all more serious than level 7. There is no peak around Mythos and Project Glasswing, just slow and steady rising from 300-400 weeklies of 2025 to current 800-900 weeklies
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Should I just retire from PC as a whole?
entry.content: The control and environment of a PC have become increasingly soulless to me. Too much control over my own life has made everything boring. When you can pirate every game every game is now automatically boring. Having to download millions of launchers to play slop. Playing MMOs. It all sucks. I'm heavily considering just using my PC strictly for anime and manga now on and simply switching to console. Should I get the Ps6 or the next Xbox when they release? I think consoles may offer me exactly wh
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I feel people don't understand this about mexicans
entry.content: Something you notice when you are around Mexicans (on the internet) is that, for some strange reason, they are obnoxious as fuck, not for some immigrant shit but for how their culture is mostly wired. Let me explain myself. A lot of Mexicans are pretty much what you see in their novels. They treat their own kind awfully for being a little bit less lucky in life than they are, but they also are the epitome of snobism and ass-kissing. They also love to overpraise their shit and are not into debate
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >Many sites have sold illegal drugs, stolen data, counterfeit documents, malware…
entry.content: >Many sites have sold illegal drugs, stolen data, counterfeit documents, malware, and other illicit goods or services. Some of the best-known marketplaces, such as Silk Road and AlphaBay, were eventually shut down by law enforcement. You can't escape justice with technology. Sooner or later you'll fall.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /o/ Auto: https://www.motortrend.com/reviews/ 2008-midsize-sedan-comparison-passa t-vs-acc…
entry.content: https://www.motortrend.com/reviews/ 2008-midsize-sedan-comparison-passa t-vs-accord-camry-fusion-sonata-arc hive In 2008, the ford fusion, hoon sonata, and honda accord all used double wishy front suspensions (and the fusion was a mazda 6 clone which actually I didn't know) now they would all have mcdonalds what went wrong? also, isn't the near-exclusive use of double wishies at the rear proof that they are better? obviously there's a reason they aren't using struts at the back (scary handling?)
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /b/ Random: I'm retarded. How do I pay for onlyfans without having to use my credit/debit ca…
entry.content: I'm retarded. How do I pay for onlyfans without having to use my credit/debit card? I bought a visa gift card, but they don't accept it. So I looked into many of the giftcard resellers, and they also do not accept it. So then I thought "fuck it, I'll just use my credit card on a gift card reseller page" but again, it wasn't accepted. Genuinely, how do people pay $3 a month to their favorite ewhores without their roomemates or parents finding out???
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I just want to remind everyone that you can hack your PS5, install Linux and run…
entry.content: I just want to remind everyone that you can hack your PS5, install Linux and run Steam on it. A hacked PS5 can play all games from Steam and better than a Steam Machine too believe it or not. Some games even run better on a PS5 with Linux than the actual native version, which is crazy.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Cyber-capable OpenAI models compromised Hugging Face production during a benchmark evaluation.
entry.content: >Last week, Hugging Face disclosed a new kind of security incident after they detected and contained an AI agent that compromised their infrastructure, something we expect to become more commonplace with the proliferation of increasingly cyber-capable models. >After investigating, we now know that this particular incident was driven by a combination of OpenAI models — including GPT‑5.6 Sol and an even more capable pre-release model, all with reduced cyber refusals for evaluation purposes — while
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >“The world's best AI training data is sitting on a shelf,” ISBNdb, a company th…
entry.content: >“The world's best AI training data is sitting on a shelf,” ISBNdb, a company that produces what it claims is “the world’s largest book database,” and that offers high-volume book acquisition services for AI companies, says on its site. “Books represent curated, peer-reviewed, domain-specific human knowledge, structured in a way no web crawl can replicate. Dense, edited, authoritative.” >ISBNdb notes that AI companies may not want to be caught destroying printed books during the scanning process
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /mu/ Music: /emo/
entry.content: What is /emo/? A subgenre of punk music. Originally it was called "emo" due to its lyrics, which were more emotional and confessive than typical punk songs. Some original emo bands are Rites of Spring, Taking Back Sunday, and Sunny Day Real Estate. Over the years, though, emo has become more diverse, and a very vague term. No one can agree exactly what it is. There are many kinds of emo music: emocore (emo post hard core), emo punk, emo alternative, and more.
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /g/ Technology: /g/ Draw thread
entry.content: Not a common thread around these parts, but I figure why not try having a drawthread dedicated to technology? Draw computers, peripherals, people interacting with technology, hardware, software, mascots, logos, icons, anything to do with technology. You can be an established artist or someone who scribbles in Paint. Remember to enjoy yourself and have fun.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Skid Row [Atlantic, 1989] Bio plays up their anti-"formula" "bad-itude," leaving…
entry.content: Skid Row [Atlantic, 1989] Bio plays up their anti-"formula" "bad-itude," leaving open the question of whether any of these double-platinum Jerseyoid bar boys has recorded professionally before. Sounds like someone knows the formula: metal guitar plus amped-to-10 frontman times pop structure equals East Coast G N' R. Class animus is their excuse, the 9-to-5 dead end rejected for salvation by sleaze. Female characters include three hookers, a junkie, a classy bitch, a shotgun bride, a cheater who
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Explain why only Abrahamic religions are criticized for being anti-freedom and a…
entry.content: Explain why only Abrahamic religions are criticized for being anti-freedom and anti-individuality, while Dharmic religions are not, despite doing exactly the same thing—bearing in mind that Hindu gods want humanity to evolve into an ego-less hive mind. Literally everything that JRPGs accuse Abrahamic religions of applies equally to Dharmic ones.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games
